name: JiimSmith Agent Inbox actions API proposes and updates next moves
description: Verify the backend endpoints behind the Home Agent Inbox can list, plan, accept, and ignore proposed next moves with clean JSON responses.

planSteps.description: Send GET {base_url}/api/v1/team/members and store the id of the member whose display_name is Adam (Lead).
Send GET {base_url}/api/v1/team/actions with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id.
Verify the response is 200 and the body is a JSON array, possibly empty.
Send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/actions/plan with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id.
Verify the response is 200 and the body is a JSON array of proposed actions or an empty array.
For each returned action, verify id, type, title, rationale, priority, status, and payload fields are present.
If at least one proposed action is returned, send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/actions/{action_id}/ignore with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id.
Verify ignore returns 200 with a JSON array and does not return a 500. If no action existed, treat the empty planned list as a valid no-op state.
